title: Corrupted Config
objective: A user state with malformed config files, used to verify OpenClaw reports corruption without wedging the gateway.

setup.title: Write Corrupted Config
setup.intent: Create malformed JSON in common config paths.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- sh -lc 'mkdir -p "$OPENCLAW_HOME/config" "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw"; printf "{ this is not valid json" > "$OPENCLAW_HOME/config/settings.json"; printf "[bad" > "$OPENCLAW_HOME/.openclaw/config.json"'
